data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Design is simplified to reduce the user's decision time when choosing from multiple options.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist interfaces with logical grouping of features.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Touch targets are optimized for easier access and interaction on mobile devices.
data.technical_spec: Button sizes and distances are calculated to minimize movement time.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design that is perceived as more usable and enjoyable by users.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of modern aesthetic principles in UI design.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements that are close to each other are perceived as related, improving intuitive understanding.
data.technical_spec: UI design leverages spatial arrangements for logical grouping.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users spend most of their time on other platforms and expect similar navigation and interface design.
data.technical_spec: Familiar design patterns and interactions used for seamless usability.
